hero.name: Miro Mariapori
intro: I am an information and communications technology engineering student who is about to graduate. My strongest area of expertise is modern web development, but I also have broad skills in other areas of software engineering, such as applying artificial intelligence, automation, and designing software systems.

I am currently working on my engineering thesis on autonomous vehicle software in collaboration with the Finnish National Defence University. I have already gained several years of experience through internships and freelance projects.

whatIDo.title: What I do
description: I design and implement software solutions from start to finish. I am proficient in both backend and frontend development, and my toolkit includes modern frameworks and technologies. This website, too, was built with Next.js.

I enjoy being involved in every stage of implementation, from planning to deployment. This helps me understand the bigger picture better, so the work does not remain just the implementation of individual features or lines of code. I am especially motivated by technical solutions that serve a real user need and also work well from the user's perspective.

howIWork.title: How I work
description: I value clean code, sensible structure, and solutions that remain maintainable beyond the first version. In my work, I balance quality, speed, and practicality: it is important to build well, but also to get things done.

I use AI tools to support ideation, speed up work, review code, and reduce repetitive tasks. However, I do not see them as a substitute for understanding. I want to know what I am building, why it works, and how to fix problems if something goes wrong.
I work well independently, but I also enjoy working in a team. I like sharing knowledge, helping others, and continuously learning from the people around me.

experience.title: Experience
description: During my internship, I had the opportunity to develop a web application for healthcare needs from the ground up. Through the project, I learned a lot about designing a complete application, understanding customer needs, building user interfaces, considering information security, and developing software for practical needs rather than just as a technical implementation.

In addition, I have worked for several years as a freelance programmer, implementing various automation solutions, websites, and plugins for clients. Through these projects, I have learned to listen to clients, quickly identify the core problem, and build a practical solution for it. Freelance work has especially developed my initiative, time management, and ability to bring projects to completion independently.

education.title: Education
description: Bachelor of Engineering, Information and Communications Technology
Major: Software Engineering
Metropolia University of Applied Sciences | Expected graduation: summer 2026

AboutPage.title: About me
AboutPage.description: I am an information and communications technology engineering student majoring in software engineering. I am especially motivated by building useful, reliable, and well-implemented applications. My strongest area of expertise is full-stack web development, and I want to further develop my skills particularly in the practical application of artificial intelligence, data-driven features, and automation. It is important to me to write code that is easy to understand, maintain, and develop further.

ContactPage.title: Contact
ContactPage.description: Do you have a project, job opportunity, or question in mind? Feel free to get in touch. I am happy to discuss software development, collaboration, and new ideas.

general.name: Miro Mariapori
general.title: Full-stack Developer | Applied AI and Data-driven Solutions
general.summary: Full-stack developer and information and communications technology engineering student with experience in web applications, backend services, interactive user interfaces, and AI- and data-driven features. I have worked especially on healthcare, research, and customer-specific software solutions where usability, reliability, data protection, and clear technical implementation are emphasized.

description: Developed a full-stack healthcare platform for planning, performing, and analyzing physiotherapy exercises in a rehabilitation system
Built and maintained a GraphQL backend that enabled real-time communication between applications and backend services
Designed and optimized data pipelines for high-frequency motion data to support responsive feedback and analytics
Designed and implemented a neural network-based motion analysis system that was trained with over 1,000 physiotherapy exercises and provided users with feedback on exercise performance
Implemented a web-based 3D exercise editor where physiotherapy movements could be designed using a humanoid model
Contributed to application development with Unity and implemented browser-based 3D visualizations with Three.js
Implemented authentication and data protection solutions for handling sensitive patient data
Implemented custom full-stack applications, backend services, and automation tools for various workflow and data processing needs
Developed a Python-based Telegram bot for automated data collection and data processing
Built and maintained WordPress-based solutions, such as custom plugins and platform-specific customizations
Evaluated the relevance and quality of online advertisements in relation to users' searches in an international quality assurance environment
Worked in time-critical air freight tasks, including cargo handling, customs-related processes, and shipment sorting
Programmed coordinate measuring machines, performed product measurements, and assisted with customer communication and sales-related tasks

projects.name: Autonomous vehicle software, engineering thesis, ongoing
description: I am developing software for an autonomous vehicle system in collaboration with the Finnish Defence Forces
The work focuses on software related to autonomous operation, real-time performance, and control. More detailed implementation information is restricted due to the confidential nature of the project

projects.name: TKIO-Finder
description: Built a full-stack platform that improves the discoverability of research and innovation projects at Metropolia University of Applied Sciences
Implemented search, filtering, and matchmaking features with React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL
Added Google OAuth2 authentication for secure and user-friendly login
Deployed and maintained backend services in a self-managed environment, including server-side infrastructure management

education.degree: Bachelor of Engineering, Information and Communications Technology
education.description: Major: Software Engineering. Expected graduation: summer 2026
